title: helichrysum tinctum
intro: Helichrysum tinctum, also known as Immortelle or Everlasting Flower, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region and is known for its bright yellow or white daisy-like flowers. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum tinctum include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of using Helichrysum tinctum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support the body's natural healing processes. Helichrysum tinctum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including wounds, burns, and skin irritations.
